item.title: Siemens Healthcare Diagnostics, Inc.: Atellica CH Enzymatic Hemoglobin A1c (A1c_E). Material Number: 11097536. Recall
item.product: Atellica CH Enzymatic Hemoglobin A1c (A1c_E). Material Number: 11097536.
item.summary: The potential for intermittent well-to-well bias on the A1c_E assay on the Atellica CH and Atellica CI analyzer which could cause falsely depressed or falsely elevated HbA1c patient results. Product details: Atellica CH Enzymatic Hemoglobin A1c (A1c_E). Material Number: 11097536.
